driver_args.description: triv REST API client — create, read, update and delete topology elements, manage projects and drivers
driver_args.expose_actions: list-nodes, get-topology-summary, create-node, update-node, update-node-label, delete-node, add-link, remove-link, get-node-capabilities, set-node-capabilities, get-node-actions, run-node-action, start-node, stop-node, restart-node, list-secrets, set-secret, delete-secret, list-networks, create-network, assign-node-to-network, delete-network, deploy-network, undeploy-network, list-orgs, list-drivers, list-projects, create-project, activate-project, reload-topology

actions.label: List Nodes
actions.description: List all nodes in the active topology with their ID, label, runtime and category

actions.label: Get Topology Summary
actions.description: Return a structured summary of the active topology: nodes, links and network definitions

actions.label: Create Node
actions.description: Create a new node in the active topology

id.description: Unique node ID (no spaces, use hyphens)

runtime.description: Runtime backend: docker, podman, libvirt, remote, app, llm, agent, or null for logical nodes

driver.description: Driver ID (e.g. generic-driver-llm). Leave empty for default.

actions.label: Update Node
actions.description: Update any field of an existing node: label, runtime, driver, category, or interfaces

node_id.description: ID of the node to update

interfaces.description: Full replacement interface list [{id, type, label}]

actions.label: Update Node Label
actions.description: Change the display label of a node

node_id.description: ID of the node to update

actions.label: Delete Node
actions.description: Remove a node from the topology (also removes connected links)

node_id.description: ID of the node to delete

actions.label: Add Link
actions.description: Connect two nodes with a link between their interfaces

actions.label: Remove Link
actions.description: Delete a link by its ID

link_id.description: ID of the link to remove

actions.label: Get Node Capabilities
actions.description: Read the current capabilities and driver configuration for a node

actions.label: Set Node Capabilities
actions.description: Write or update the capabilities (drivers and driver_args) for a node

capabilities_json.description: Full capabilities JSON as a string (must include a drivers array)

actions.label: Get Node Actions
actions.description: List the executable actions available on a node (driver commands)

actions.label: Run Node Action
actions.description: Execute a driver action on a node (e.g. status, list-models, chat)

action_id.description: ID of the action to execute

actions.label: List Networks
actions.description: List all network definitions in the active topology

actions.label: Create Network
actions.description: Create a new named network definition (bridge, vlan, or trunk)

type.description: Network type: bridge, vlan, or trunk

actions.label: Assign Node to Network
actions.description: Attach a node interface to a network definition

iface_id.description: ID of the interface on the node

network_id.description: ID of the network definition to attach to

actions.label: List Drivers
actions.description: List all available drivers in the driver catalog (built-in and vendor)

actions.label: List Projects
actions.description: List all registered triv projects, showing which one is currently active

actions.label: Create Project
actions.description: Create a new triv project. If 'vendor' is given, the project is created under ~/.triv/vendors/<vendor>/. The project is registered but not activated — call activate-project afterwards.

vendor.description: Vendor name — project will be created under ~/.triv/vendors/<vendor>/

dir_name.description: Directory name (slug). Derived from name if omitted.

actions.label: Activate Project
actions.description: Switch to a registered project, loading its topology as the active one

project_id.description: ID of the project to activate

actions.label: Reload Topology
actions.description: Reload the topology from disk for the active project

actions.label: Start Node
actions.description: Start a node (VM, container, or service)

node_id.description: ID of the node to start

actions.label: Stop Node
actions.description: Stop a running node (VM, container, or service)

node_id.description: ID of the node to stop

actions.label: Restart Node
actions.description: Restart a node (stop then start)

node_id.description: ID of the node to restart

actions.label: List Secrets
actions.description: List all secret names in the triv secrets store (values are never returned)

actions.label: Set Secret
actions.description: Create or update a named secret in the triv secrets store

type.description: Secret type: api-key, bearer, url, token

actions.label: Delete Secret
actions.description: Delete a named secret from the triv secrets store

name.description: Name of the secret to delete

actions.label: Delete Network
actions.description: Delete a network definition

network_id.description: ID of the network to delete

actions.label: Deploy Network
actions.description: Deploy a network definition to the host (creates the bridge/vlan)

network_id.description: ID of the network to deploy

actions.label: Undeploy Network
actions.description: Remove a deployed network from the host

network_id.description: ID of the network to undeploy

actions.label: List Organizations
actions.description: List all organizations registered in triv
